zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmont於1195年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲道恩多姆-拉馬斯多福薩爾姆時，他的父親Heinrich III Graf von Salm26歲，母親Judith de Haute-Lorraine24歲。他於1225年之前與Jeanne Elisabeth von Bar在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1258年在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒布拉蒙特享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmont于1195年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲道恩多姆-拉馬斯多福薩爾姆时，他的父亲Heinrich III Graf von Salm26岁，母亲Judith de Haute-Lorraine24岁。他于1225年之前与Jeanne Elisabeth von Bar在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1258年在法国德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒布拉蒙特享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmont was born in 1195, in Salm, Dohm-Lammersdorf, Daun, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Heinrich III Graf von Salm, was 26 and his mother, Judith de Haute-Lorraine, was 24. He married Jeanne Elisabeth von Bar before 1225, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1258, in Blâmont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmont est né en 1195, à Salm, Dohm-Lammersdorf, Daun, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich III Graf von Salm, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Judith de Haute-Lorraine, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne Elisabeth von Bar avant 1225, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1258, à Blâmont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmont 1195 in Salm, Dohm-Lammersdorf, Daun, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich III Graf von Salm 26 und seine Mutter Judith de Haute-Lorraine 24. Er hat vor 1225 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich Jeanne Elisabeth von Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1258 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Blâmont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmont è nato il nel 1195 nel Salm, Dohm-Lammersdorf, Daun, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Heinrich III Graf von Salm, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Judith de Haute-Lorraine, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne Elisabeth von Bar prima del 1225, nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1258, nel Blâmont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmontが1195年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズダウンドム-ランメルスドルフサルムで生まれた時，父Heinrich III Graf von Salmは26歳，母Judith de Haute-Lorraineは24歳であった。1225年以前にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックでJeanne Elisabeth von Barと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1258年にフランスグランド エストメウルスエ-エト-モセルブルaモントで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmont(이)가 1195년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 도 도h-램머즈도르프 살름에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich III Graf von Salm(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith de Haute-Lorraine(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1225년 이전 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 Jeanne Elisabeth von Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 블a몽에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmont nasceu em 1195, em Salm, Dohm-Lammersdorf, Daun, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich III Graf von Salm, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Haute-Lorraine, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne Elisabeth von Bar antes 1225, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1258, em Blâmont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmont родился в 1195 г. в местности салм, дохм-лэммирсдорф, даун, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich III Graf von Salm было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith de Haute-Lorraine, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne Elisabeth von Bar перед 1225 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1258 г. в местности блaмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich I von Salm-Blâmont nació en 1195, en Salm, Dohm-Lammersdorf, Daun, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich III Graf von Salm, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Judith de Haute-Lorraine, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Jeanne Elisabeth von Bar antes de 1225, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1258, en Blâmont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 63 años.
